audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in thread_group.cc are through `_imp`, a shared_ptr guaranteed non-null after successful construction (set via `reset(new ThreadGroupImpl(...))`) and never nulled before use. The `handle` parameters in dispatch/post are forwarded to `_imp` without being dereferenced in this file; the actual dereferences occur in thread_group_impl.h's closure helpers, outside the scoped file.
